_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: Matrigel plugs harvested from Nf1+/− mice were invested with more CD31-positive vessel-like networks when compared with Matrigel plugs harvested from WT mice
details: Increased CD31-positive vessel-like networks in Matrigel plugs containing VEGF compared to WT mice
